name: Clear Command History
description: Detects clearing of command history files on Unix or PowerShell history
query:
// Detect clearing of command history
// Trigger on history -c, rm .bash_history, or Clear-History
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(history\s+-c|rm.*\.bash_history|rm.*\.zsh_history|Clear-History|Remove-Item.*ConsoleHost_history|unset\s+HISTFILE|export\s+HISTSIZE=0)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
